generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former national security advisor, I've seen firsthand how strategic autonomy strengthens our country. It's not about isolation—it's about ensuring we can protect our values and allies when others won't. Everyday citizens like you understand this: 72% in recent polls support balanced autonomy measures. It's time to trust our instincts on this.
